name: native-engine
description: Output of the macOS on-device OCR engine (hyperlit-ocr) on a deterministic CoreGraphics-drawn PDF — regenerate with generate_pdf.swift + macOShyperlit/bin/hyperlit-ocr on source.pdf. Locks the engine's contract with the pipeline: [^N] superscripts, [^N]: defs, # headings, running headers stripped to the header field.
